description: A technical SEO audit has found several broken internal links on the website that need to be fixed.

nodes.task_description: Get the list of broken links and the pages they are on from the SEO audit report.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has a clear list of URLs to fix.

nodes.task_description: For each broken link, find the correct new URL for the intended destination page.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the correct destination for each link.

nodes.task_description: Edit the source pages to update the broken links with the correct URLs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully fixes all the identified broken links.
